title: Helldivers : Crafted Democracy
description:
Spread Liberty to new worlds Helldiver! - Explore a host of worlds in need of liberation across the Galaxy! and crush the foes of freedom with the selection of weapons, armor and stratagems provided to you by S.E.A.F High Command!

[ - This mod in Beta - ]
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d7d668bd1d5d749e48cc0ca8beefe853fbf16fe6.png)

Spread Liberty to new worlds Helldiver! - Explore a host of worlds in need of liberation across the Galaxy! and crush the foes of freedom with the selection of weapons, armor and stratagems provided to you by S.E.A.F High Command!

[ - This mod is DEV BUILD 1.8 - The mod is  being moved from mcreator to manually written code! (That is why new updates haven't been made, if you know how to code in forge, join the discord if you'd like to help code for the mod!) ]


This mod requires Geckolib! - It is compatible with Oculus/embeddium and distant horizons as well!

[It is recommended to use _TacZ: Escalation of Freedom_](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/customization/tacz-helldivers-escalation-of-freedom)

[NOTE: YOU NEED TO MANUALLY SET THE CONTROLS FOR AIMING/SHOOTING, DEFAULT THEY ARE NOT ASSIGNED]

[NOTE: UNDER NO CIRCUMSTANCES IS THIS PROJECT RELATED TO HELLDIVERS OR RELATED MEDIA  THIS IS A COMMUNITY MOD PROJECT]
